title: The siege of KBR National Park: Concrete closing in on Hyderabad’s green heart
description: KBR National Park is at the centre of fresh public outrage, this time over the flyovers and underpasses rising around it under the Hyderabad City Innovative and Transformative Infrastructure project. This island of tranquillity in the heart of a bustling metropolis has faced threats since its inception, raising persistent questions over its very status as a national park. Swathi Vadlamudi explores the existential crisis confronting the urban haven
